title: Home Screen - Update Available - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Verify that when both earbuds are connected and an update is available, the Status Box displays battery levels, connection status, and software version details, and tapping it hides the software fields.
steps: Ensure both earbuds are connected to the device.
Confirm that a firmware update is available for the earbuds.
Observe the Status Box on the interface.
Verify that the Status Box displays the battery levels for Left earbud, Right earbud, and the Case.
Check that the Status Box shows a 'connected' status with a green indicator.
Check that the current software version is displayed with a red indicator.
Check that the available update version is displayed.
Verify that the Software and Available fields are hidden after tapping.
expected: The Status Box shows Left, Right, and Case battery levels, a "connected" status with green indicator, current software version with red indicator, and the available update version. After tapping the Status Box, the Software and Available fields are hidden.
